title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) 2026 Knowledge Base

overview.title: OCI Overview & Strategy
overview.content: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) is a comprehensive cloud computing platform offering IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS solutions designed for enterprise workloads. OCI is architected for scale-up workloads with ultralow-latency networks, built-in security, and clustering for high availability.
key_points: Dedicated regions for government and compliance (FedRAMP, DISA IL5)
Free Tier: 20+ services with no time limits
US$300 in free credits for additional services
Focus on AI/ML integration across all services
overview.positioning: Compete with AWS, Azure; strength in database, enterprise workloads, AI

compute.use_cases: Application servers, databases, HPC, containerized apps

database.standout: Autonomous Database: 66% more efficient DBAs, $5M annual benefits for large orgs

networking.advantage: Ultralow-latency networks designed for demanding workloads

ai_ml_services.title: Oracle AI & ML Services (2026 Focus)
ai_ml_services.description: AI/ML is deeply integrated into OCI services, not just bolt-on

Oracle_AI_Cloud.description: Suite of ML services integrated into OCI
capabilities: Automated ML (AutoML for rapid model building)
Massive data warehouse + OLTP on same DB

FedRAMP.description: Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program
FedRAMP.status: FedRAMP Authorized for OCI (Moderate & High impact)

DISA_IL5.description: Defense Information Security Agency Impact Level 5
DISA_IL5.services: Exadata Cloud@Customer, Generative AI, other authorized services
DISA_IL5.use_cases: Department of Defense, military classified workloads

Cloud_One_DoD.description: Department of Defense cloud modernization program
Cloud_One_DoD.case_study: US Air Force accelerating cloud modernization with OCI (Feb 2026)

Exadata_Cloud_At_Customer.description: Run Oracle Exadata in your own data center, managed by OCI
Exadata_Cloud_At_Customer.ideal_for: Regulated industries (healthcare, finance), data residency requirements

Multicloud.description: Design spanning public cloud, hybrid, edge, and on-prem
Multicloud.tools: OCI Architecture Center provides multicloud patterns

developer_tools.title: Developer & DevOps Tools
tools: Container Engine for Kubernetes (OKE, managed K8s)
Crossplane Provider for OCI (Infrastructure as Code, expanding coverage)
OCI CLI & SDKs (Python, Java, Go, etc.)

infrastructure_as_code.crossplane: Latest update expands core services (Compute, Storage, more coming)

oracle_fusion.title: Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP (2026)
oracle_fusion.description: SaaS enterprise resource planning suite, built on OCI

key_features.ai_embedded: AI/ML throughout: demand forecasting, predictive analytics, anomaly detection
key_features.mobile_first: Full mobile app for all modules
key_features.automation: Intelligent automation for recurring tasks (invoice processing, etc.)
key_features.extensibility: Low-code customization via OCI Integration Cloud

oci_vs_competitors.title: OCI vs. AWS / Azure (2026 Positioning)

strengths.database: Autonomous Database, MySQL HeatWave, Exadata = best-in-class
strengths.government: FedRAMP, DISA IL5, dedicated government regions
strengths.ai_integration: AI embedded in most services, not just add-on
strengths.hybrid: Exadata Cloud@Customer = best on-prem + cloud hybrid
strengths.price: Generally 3-4x cheaper per compute unit vs. AWS/Azure for same performance
strengths.ecosystem: Oracle apps (Fusion, NetSuite, etc.) integrate seamlessly

challenges.services_breadth: Fewer total services than AWS (but focused selection)
challenges.developer_mind_share: Less popular among startups, more enterprise-focused

ideal_customers: Large orgs needing cost savings on compute/database
Organizations already using Fusion or other Oracle apps

latest_news_feb_2026: US Air Force accelerates cloud modernization with OCI Cloud One program
Exadata Cloud@Customer adds DISA IL5, FedRAMP authorized services
MySQL HeatWave expands AI/ML capabilities (AutoML, generative AI)
Crossplane Provider for OCI updated with expanded resource coverage
OCI AI Accelerator Packs launched (prebuilt, deploy-in-minutes AI solutions)
recommended_reading: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure for Solutions Architects (book)
